message:
fix(test): update signal fallback contract to match Windows support

The signal module was updated (9270c9a2) to support Windows via
signal-hook, changing #[cfg(not(unix))] to #[cfg(not(any(unix, windows)))]
and the fallback message. Update the contract test to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
